remarksConcat: 1.39 acres backing to Bat Conservation Area * Heated pool + spa * 4-car oversized garage * Gated Seven Hills Ranch    Custom 4,164 SF two-story home built in 2007 in gated Seven Hills Ranch. Situated on 1.39 acres with mature heritage oaks, level topography, and greenbelt boundary backing to a protected Bat Conservation Area. Stone and stucco exterior with concrete roof and circular drive.    Open floor plan with 4 bedrooms, 3 full baths, dedicated study, formal dining, two living areas, and high ceilings. Living room features stone fireplace with gas logs and wide windows framing tree canopy and sunset views. Island kitchen with cooktop, double ovens, walk-in pantry, butler's pantry, breakfast area, and adjacent dining space.    Primary suite located on main level with outdoor access, walk-in closet, and bath with soaking tub and separate shower. Guest en-suite with private bath provides secondary primary option. Two additional bedrooms upstairs with shared hall bath and additional living/family room.    Exterior includes covered patio, heated in-ground pool and spa, wrought iron fencing, and expansive yard with mature oak trees. Property borders protected land providing unobstructed Hill Country views and added privacy.    Oversized 4-car garage accommodates vehicles, boat, or storage. Circular driveway allows additional parking and guest access.    Energy features include spray foam insulation, radiant barrier decking, double-pane windows, dehumidifier, HVAC (3+ units, zoned), ceiling fans, and electric water heater. Private well. Central vacuum system. Water softener (owned).    Interior features include wood, tile, and carpet flooring; high ceilings; open living areas; utility room; attic with radiant barrier and partial flooring; security system (owned); and pre-wiring for security.    Level lot and level drive. Accessibility features include 36-inch-wide halls, first-floor bedroom, and first-floor bath.

Discover the freedom to build your Hill Country retreat on this scenic 8-acre homesite in Eden Ranch. With sweeping Hill Country views, sloping terrain, and a natural landscape of mature oaks and cedar, this property offers the perfect canvas for a custom home designed to take full advantage of the surrounding beauty.    The gently rolling topography creates ideal building opportunities for a home with elevated views, expansive patios, and outdoor living spaces that capture the sunrise and sunset over the Texas Hill Country. Electric is available and private wells are allowed, giving you flexibility as you design and build your dream property.    Located on paved Eden Ranch Drive, this acreage provides the privacy and elbow room buyers are searching for, while still being close to everything that makes Canyon Lake living special. Spend weekends boating, fishing, and enjoying nearby Canyon Lake and Guadalupe River recreation, or take a short drive to dining, shopping, and entertainment in New Braunfels and the surrounding Hill Country communities.    With no HOA, you'll enjoy greater freedom in how you design your property, while mobile and manufactured homes are restricted, helping preserve the character and quality of the surrounding acreage homesites.    If you've been searching for space, views, and the relaxed outdoorsy Hill Country lifestyle, this property is ready for your vision.
